text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
H-huuuh?! W-wait, you're the one who won, not
me, so I can't—
choice_data_list:
But this is why I played the game in the first
place.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you so much! I'll remember this forever!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-all right! Now we just have to see how much
confidence rubs off on me...
